allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://kantselariya.local/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" --data-raw "{\\"query\\":\\"fragment PF on Product { databaseId slug name sku averageRating reviewCount reviews\(first: 5\) { edges { rating node { id databaseId date content author { node { name } } } } } ... on SimpleProduct { price regularPrice salePrice stockStatus stockQuantity } } query Q { products\(first: 5\) { nodes { ...PF } } }\\"}")
